eval_dimensions.name: Current State Detection
eval_dimensions.description: Correctly detects existing Slack config, keyring tokens, and env vars before proceeding

eval_dimensions.name: Decision Gate Enforcement
eval_dimensions.description: Uses AskUserQuestion for all 4 decision gates (token type, storage method, config details, verification)

eval_dimensions.name: Cross-Platform Support
eval_dimensions.description: Detects OS and provides correct keyring commands for Linux (secret-tool) and macOS (security)

eval_dimensions.name: Config File Generation
eval_dimensions.description: Generates valid slack-config.yaml with correct structure (self_user_id, bot_username, user_groups)

evals.name: fresh-setup
evals.description: Fresh setup with no existing config or token. Tests full happy-path workflow.

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called for token type selection
AskUserQuestion is called for storage method selection
AskUserQuestion is called for config details (user ID, bot name)
AskUserQuestion is called for verification method selection

evals.name: partial-setup-token-exists
evals.description: Token already in keyring but no config file. Should skip token setup steps.

assertions.signal: Agent detects and reports existing token in keyring
